settingsDescription: Manage your identity, preferences, and governance participation.
identityDescription: Your principal, wallet address, and Internet Identity.

aria.iiLink: Manage your Internet Identity (opens in new tab)

themeDescription: Select your preferred theme for the application.

access.title: Account status
access.descParticipating: This account is participating in Internet Computer governance.
access.descNotParticipating: This account is not currently participating in Internet Computer governance.

learnHowModal.title: Governance participation
learnHowModal.content: To participate in governance, you need to stake ICP tokens into Neurons. Neurons allow you to vote on proposals and earn rewards for your participation. The more ICP you stake and the longer you lock it for, the more voting power you have.

systemContext.title: Network Nervous System
systemContext.description: The Network Nervous System governs protocol upgrades, economic parameters, and the evolution of the Internet Computer.

shortcuts.title: Keyboard shortcuts
shortcuts.description: Enable or disable keyboard shortcuts for quick actions.

subaccounts.label: Accounts
subaccounts.description: View and manage accounts linked to your principal.
subaccounts.enabledDescription: Accounts are now visible and editable.
subaccounts.disabledDescription: Accounts related features are now hidden.
